depth_pass: A2 Pass 4 — State addenda structured promotion

overrides.override_summary: Post-term non-compete covenant may not be enforceable under California law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may not be bound by 18-month/25-mile post-term non-compete

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages clauses unenforceable under Civil Code 1671
overrides.why_it_matters: Unauthorized closure penalty and other liquidated damages may be void

overrides.override_summary: Texas governing law provision may not be enforceable under California law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchise law may override Texas choice of law

overrides.override_summary: Termination on bankruptcy may not be enforceable under federal bankruptcy law
overrides.why_it_matters: Automatic termination trigger for bankruptcy may be void

overrides.override_summary: Cannot waive rights under Franchise Investment Law or Franchise Relations Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Release required at renewal/transfer cannot waive state franchise law protections

overrides.override_summary: CA Business & Professions Code 20000-20043 provides rights re termination, transfer, non-renewal; law controls if FA inconsistent
overrides.why_it_matters: State termination protections override FA terms

overrides.override_summary: Shortened statute of limitations void per Corporations Code 31512
overrides.why_it_matters: Full CA statute of limitations applies

overrides.override_summary: 7-day advance FDD delivery required before binding agreement or payment
overrides.why_it_matters: Rescission right if not delivered 7 days before

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may bring lawsuit in Maryland for claims under MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law
overrides.why_it_matters: Not required to litigate in Texas for MD franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: Release/waiver void to extent inconsistent with MD franchise law
overrides.why_it_matters: Renewal/transfer releases cannot waive MD franchise law rights

overrides.override_summary: Termination on bankruptcy may not be enforceable under federal bankruptcy law
overrides.why_it_matters: Same as CA

overrides.override_summary: Termination requires good cause with written notice and reasonable cure (up to 30 days)
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot terminate without good cause; cure opportunity mandatory

overrides.override_summary: Cannot refuse renewal without fair compensation if term <5 years and post-term non-compete exists
overrides.why_it_matters: Fair market value compensation required at non-renewal (if applicable)

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require arbitration or litigation outside Michigan
overrides.why_it_matters: Texas venue/arbitration provisions void for MI franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Cannot refuse transfer without good cause; includes right of first refusal
overrides.why_it_matters: Transfer refusal must have specific good cause

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination with 60 days to cure required
overrides.why_it_matters: Longer cure period than FA's 30-day default

overrides.override_summary: 180 days notice of intent not to renew required; opportunity to recover fair market value
overrides.why_it_matters: Significant non-renewal protection beyond FA terms

overrides.override_summary: Choice of law void to extent binding MN resident to waive MN franchise law compliance
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchise law applies regardless of Texas choice of law

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require waiver of rights under GBL §687.5; release void to extent violating non-waiver provisions
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchise law protections cannot be waived by release/questionnaire/acknowledgment

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require general release upon renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Renewal not conditioned on release for ND franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require consent to termination penalties or liquidated damages
overrides.why_it_matters: Unauthorized closure penalty and termination damages may be void

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require consent to jurisdiction outside North Dakota
overrides.why_it_matters: Texas venue provisions void for ND franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Cannot restrict claim period to less than ND statute of limitations
overrides.why_it_matters: Full ND statute of limitations applies

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require waiver of jury trial or exemplary/punitive damages
overrides.why_it_matters: Jury trial right preserved; punitive damages available

overrides.override_summary: Subject to ND Century Code 9-08-06; may be unenforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: Post-term non-compete likely unenforceable in ND

overrides.override_summary: Mediation/arbitration must be in Fargo, ND if parties cannot agree on location
overrides.why_it_matters: Plano, TX mediation venue overridden
